title: Cognee Search Payload
description: Request body for the POST /api/v1/search endpoint

search_type.description: Type of search to perform against the knowledge graph

datasets.description: Dataset names to scope the search (resolved to datasets owned by caller)

dataset_ids.description: Dataset UUIDs to scope the search (allows cross-user access if permitted)

system_prompt.description: System prompt to use for completion-type searches
system_prompt.default: Answer the question using the provided context. Be as brief as possible.

node_name.description: Filter results to specific node_sets defined during the add pipeline

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return

only_context.description: Return only context without making an LLM completion call

skills.description: Skills to enable for agentic search modes

tools.description: Tools to enable for agentic search modes

max_iter.description: Maximum number of iterations for agentic search
